hero.headline: *No leak* stands a chance in Huntsville
hero.subheadline: Nathan and the crew track down every drip, fix every clog, and show up when they say they will. That's the difference.

services_section.label: THE FIX
services_section.heading: Every pipe, every leak, every problem
services_section.subheading: From hidden leaks to stubborn clogs, we handle what's broken so you don't have to worry about it

services.title: Leak Detection & Repair
services.description: We find the source fast and fix it right the first time. No guessing, no mess, no coming back tomorrow.

services.title: Drain Cleaning
services.description: Sink backing up? Shower draining slow? We clear the clog and get everything flowing like new again.

services.title: Emergency Plumbing
services.description: Burst pipes and midnight disasters don't wait for business hours. Neither do we when you need help.

services.title: Water Heater Service
services.description: When your hot water quits, we get it back fast. Repairs, replacements, and everything in between.

about.heading: Huntsville plumbing that actually works
about.body: Nathan leads our team with one simple rule: fix it right the first time. No shortcuts, no excuses. We've built our reputation in Huntsville by showing up on time, diagnosing problems quickly, and charging fair prices for quality work. When your pipes need attention, you need plumbers who know what they're doing.

reviews.name: Max B.
reviews.text: Found both leaks fast and fixed them perfectly. These guys know their stuff.

reviews.name: Logan O.
reviews.text: Professional team with honest pricing. Exactly what you want from a plumber.

reviews.name: Reed N.
reviews.text: Nathan showed up on time and handled our leak quickly. Highly recommend for any plumbing work.

reviews.name: Bryce S.
reviews.text: Nathan cleared my sink and shower drains perfectly. Will definitely call him again.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Huntsville and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Fast, reliable plumbing service throughout North Alabama

cta.heading: Ready to fix what's broken?
cta.body: Don't let that leak get worse or that clog back up your whole day. Call Nathan and get it handled right.
